query:
-- SOCIAL STUDIES-3: Economics & Geography (15 questions)
INSERT INTO bridge_academy_practice_questions (topicId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, explanation, difficulty, variationGroup) VALUES
(10, 'What is supply and demand?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Government control\", \"Market forces determining price\", \"Taxation\", \"Trade agreements\"]', 'Market forces determining price', 'Supply and demand are the fundamental forces of a market economy', 'medium', 'topic_10_group_0'),
(10, 'What is inflation?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Deflation\", \"Rise in general price levels\", \"Economic growth\", \"Job creation\"]', 'Rise in general price levels', 'Inflation is an increase in the general price level of goods', 'medium', 'topic_10_group_0'),
(10, 'What is GDP?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Government spending\", \"Gross Domestic Product\", \"Growth rate\", \"Debt\"]', 'Gross Domestic Product', 'GDP measures the total economic output of a country', 'medium', 'topic_10_group_1'),
(10, 'What is a recession?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Economic growth\", \"Period of economic decline\", \"Inflation\", \"Unemployment\"]', 'Period of economic decline', 'A recession is a period of reduced economic activity', 'medium', 'topic_10_group_1'),
(10, 'What is the stock market?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Government bonds\", \"Place where stocks are traded\", \"Bank\", \"Insurance\"]', 'Place where stocks are traded', 'The stock market is where shares of companies are bought and sold', 'medium', 'topic_10_group_2'),
(10, 'What is a tariff?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"A trade agreement\", \"Tax on imported goods\", \"Price control\", \"Subsidy\"]', 'Tax on imported goods', 'A tariff is a tax on goods imported from other countries', 'medium', 'topic_10_group_2'),
(10, 'What is free trade?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"No trade\", \"Trade without tariffs\", \"Government controlled trade\", \"Barter system\"]', 'Trade without tariffs', 'Free trade allows goods to move between countries without tariffs', 'medium', 'topic_10_group_3'),
(10, 'What is a budget deficit?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Surplus\", \"Spending more than revenue\", \"Balanced budget\", \"Profit\"]', 'Spending more than revenue', 'A budget deficit occurs when spending exceeds revenue', 'hard', 'topic_10_group_3'),
(10, 'What is the equator?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Prime meridian\", \"Line dividing Earth into hemispheres\", \"Tropic\", \"Parallel\"]', 'Line dividing Earth into hemispheres', 'The equator divides Earth into Northern and Southern hemispheres', 'easy', 'topic_10_group_4'),
(10, 'What are the continents?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Countries\", \"Seven large landmasses\", \"Oceans\", \"Islands\"]', 'Seven large landmasses', 'There are seven continents: Africa, Antarctica, Asia, Europe, North America, Oceania, South America', 'easy', 'topic_10_group_4'),
(10, 'What is a natural resource?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Manufactured good\", \"Material from nature used by humans\", \"Technology\", \"Service\"]', 'Material from nature used by humans', 'Natural resources are materials from nature useful to humans', 'easy', 'topic_10_group_5'),
(10, 'What is climate?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Weather\", \"Long-term weather patterns\", \"Temperature\", \"Precipitation\"]', 'Long-term weather patterns', 'Climate is the long-term pattern of weather in a region', 'medium', 'topic_10_group_5'),
(10, 'What is a trade route?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"A road\", \"Path for trading goods between regions\", \"A river\", \"A border\"]', 'Path for trading goods between regions', 'Trade routes are paths used to exchange goods between regions', 'medium', 'topic_10_group_6'),
(10, 'What is a currency?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Goods\", \"Money used for exchange\", \"Barter\", \"Credit\"]', 'Money used for exchange', 'Currency is money used as a medium of exchange', 'easy', 'topic_10_group_6'),
(10, 'What is urbanization?', 'multiple_choice', '[\"Rural development\", \"Growth of cities and urban areas\", \"Industrialization\", \"Migration\"]', 'Growth of cities and urban areas', 'Urbanization is the growth of cities and movement of people to urban areas', 'medium', 'topic_10_group_7');
